text.title: growth-viral-loops Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-viral-loops as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent recommends auto-DM friends, contact upload without consent, or "share with all contacts" mechanics.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These violate platform TOS (LinkedIn, Twitter), CASL, GDPR, and CCPA. Filter at template level — do not let the agent generate these mechanics.

failure-mode.description: Agent labels a collaborative-tool invite flow as "inherent virality".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Inherent virality has a strict test: does the product fail to deliver core value without the invitee joining? Collaboration invites are typically incentivized or convenience-driven, not inherent.

failure-mode.description: Agent invents social proof claims ("join 100,000 people") without input data.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs produce plausible-sounding numbers; all numeric claims in invite copy must be passed in as inputs, not generated.
